name: Masala Dosa
description: Crispy rice-and-lentil crepe filled with spiced potato masala, served with sambar and chutney.

name: Idli Sambar
description: Steamed rice cakes served with hot sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Pongal
description: Creamy rice and moong dal dish tempered with cumin, pepper, and ghee.

name: Podi Idli
description: Soft idlis tossed in spicy gunpowder podi and sesame oil.

name: Chicken 65
description: Deep-fried spicy chicken bites marinated in curry leaves, ginger, and chili.

name: Gobi Manchurian
description: Crispy cauliflower florets tossed in a tangy Indo-Chinese manchurian sauce.

name: Fish Fry
description: Marinated fish fillets shallow-fried with a spiced rice flour coating.

name: Paneer Tikka
description: Grilled cottage cheese cubes marinated in yogurt and tandoori spices.

name: Veg Meals
description: Full vegetarian thali with rice, sambar, rasam, poriyal, curd, and papad.

name: Non-Veg Meals
description: Full meal with rice, chicken curry, rasam, poriyal, curd, and papad.

name: Curd Rice
description: Comforting rice mixed with fresh curd, tempered with mustard and curry leaves.

name: Sambar Rice
description: Steamed rice mixed with lentil sambar and served with a side of vegetable poriyal.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked with marinated chicken and traditional spices.

name: Mutton Biryani
description: Rich and aromatic biryani made with tender mutton pieces and basmati rice.

name: Vegetable Biryani
description: Basmati rice cooked with mixed vegetables, herbs, and whole spices.

name: Egg Biryani
description: Spiced basmati rice layered with boiled eggs and fried onions.

name: Chettinad Chicken Curry
description: Chicken simmered in a fiery Chettinad masala with roasted spices and coconut.

name: Mutton Sukka
description: Dry-roasted mutton tossed with coconut slivers and Chettinad spice blend.

name: Meen Kuzhambu
description: Tangy tamarind-based fish curry cooked in traditional Chettinad style.

name: Kaara Kuzhambu
description: Spicy tamarind gravy with shallots, ideal with steamed rice.

name: Veg Fried Rice
description: Wok-tossed rice with mixed vegetables and soy sauce.

name: Chicken Noodles
description: Stir-fried noodles tossed with chicken strips and vegetables in soy sauce.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft milk-solid dumplings soaked in warm sugar syrup.

name: Payasam
description: Traditional sweet made with rice, jaggery, milk, and cardamom, available on request.

name: Filter Coffee
description: Classic South Indian filter coffee brewed with fresh milk and chicory blend.
